strands.title: Local execution context and caveats
strands.content: User operates in local command execution context. Prior local command output should not be treated as conversational input requiring response. Recent local commands include /model command to set model configuration.
key_claims: Local-command-generated content excluded from conversational scope unless explicitly referenced
Model configuration command executed in local context

strands.title: Working directory and project setup
strands.content: User (tony) has established ~/projects (/home/tony/projects) as a working directory with permissions management available. This state is saved to local settings.
key_claims: Permissions management is available for this directory
Directory configuration is persisted in local settings

strands.title: Model configuration state
strands.content: Local model configuration set to Claude Opus (claude-opus-4-6). This command was executed in local context and per caveat, should not be treated as requiring response unless explicitly referenced.

declared_losses.what_was_lost: Detailed command execution metadata (timestamps, return codes, intermediate output)
declared_losses.why: Local command caveat applies; non-conversational local output retained only as state change summary

declared_losses.what_was_lost: User intent behind model configuration change
declared_losses.why: No explicit user reasoning provided; command-only input allows only state inference

open_questions: What is the user's goal with the ~/projects directory addition?
Will subsequent commands operate within this working directory?
What permissions configurations does the user intend?
Why was the model switched to Opus? Is this for increased capability, cost considerations, or other reasons?
Will future interactions use this Opus model as default, or is this a one-off configuration?
instructions_for_next:
[
  "Continue tracking state changes from /model and other configuration commands in local context",
  "Monitor for explicit user queries or commands that reference local output or state",
  "Remain alert to any rescission of the local-command-caveat or request to incorporate prior local output",
  "If user engages conversationally about ~/projects or model configuration, leverage integrated state without re-explaining caveat mechanics",
  "Watch for pivots from configuration setup to actual project work or substantive queries"
]
